'''Zeltros: Pleasure Planet''' is a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement that was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[January]] [[2004]]. Part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series, it was published in five chapters, and describes [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] culture and society, the government of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]], and the saga of the [[Hiromi]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: Who Doesn't Like Zeltrons?===
''…happy visitors recount why [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]] is the ultimate vacation destination.''<ref name="Zeltros" />

===Part 2: The King and Queen of Hearts===
''…we meet the monarchs of Zeltros, [[King/Legends|King]] [[Arno (Zeltron)|Arno]] and [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Leonie]].''<ref name="Zeltros" />

===Part 3: Just a Cafarel===
''…a [[Derc|Zeltron male]] pursues a [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|princess of Alderaan]] and discovers a new way to win her heart.''<ref name="Zeltros" />

===Part 4: I, Hiromi===
''…the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Zeltron is invaded three times in three [[Standard day/Legends|days]], but none of them stick.''<ref name="Zeltros" />

===Part 5: The Zeltron Who Cried===
''…we meet [[Dani/Legends|Dani]], a Zeltron unlike any other.''<ref name="Zeltros" />
